Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mell]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Mell is a character who has a workshop containing various robotic creations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — Mell is a character who wears a dusty lab coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — Mell has a console strapped to her wrist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 15''' — Mell received a rejection message from The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Mell is a location within Union space.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Mell uses glasses to display the status of her lab and surrounding Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Mell is a person whose actions Starhammer is contemplating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer wonders if something is part of Mell's plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Mell is someone Starhammer would want to meet upon learning of her capture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Mell is someone the team needs to rescue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Mell was dressed as Doctor Nova.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Mell is a Technician who makes things that break into things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Mell is a target indicated by pathfinding spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 13''' — Mell piloted a decoy bot before being arrested.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — Mell was being kidnapped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — Mell was flailing her hands and legs in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Mell was being held in a prison cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Mell designed Starhammer to protect her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Mell was being held by Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Mell is the creator of Starhammer and built him to be her protector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Mell is an Engineer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Mell built Starhammer’s Temporal Field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Mell does not have an armor gift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Mell is considered one of the Advocates' greatest enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Mell was wearing a white jumpsuit of a prisoner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Mell protests Horizon's decision to assemble a crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — The narrator places a hand on Mell's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — Mell wears a white lab coat over black clothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — Mell is an Aether Technician.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Mell is a member of the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Mell is a character who tests the narrator's trustworthiness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Mell has a lab.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Mell was grown in a lab.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Mell was cloned from the DNA of four human Aether Technicians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Mell created Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Mell sabotaged the inventory system of Stellar Synthesis Labs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Mell is working on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — Mell is a character who was observing a half-finished ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Mell is an ally of the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — Mell uses goggles and works with Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Mell is someone Starhammer is searching for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Mell is the Engineer of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Mell does not have a repair gift for ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Mell was taken by Queen Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Mell wears glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Mell defends Starhammer's character.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Mell has a Technician's gift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Mell knows about Starhammer's tactics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Mell transfers her consciousness to a robot using a helmet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Mell designed the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Mell created the Evolution Engine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — Mell mentions being kidnapped before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 42''' — Mell is a member of the crew of the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Starhammer had interactions with Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Mell is a person who insisted the Evolution Engine made Starhammer oblivious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Mell operates various ship systems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Mell is mentioned by Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Mell manifested from blue light at the helm of one of The Last Horizon’s shuttles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — The location of Mell is known to others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — Mell was waiting in orbit during the heist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — The narrator told Starhammer where to find Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Mell spent five days gathering the rest of her crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Mell can build decoy-bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Mell was teleported to a nearby shuttle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Mell has proof regarding Starhammer's secret.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 53''' — Mell is grieving for Starhammer.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — Mell is a person who wears a white lab coat popularized as Doctor Nova.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — Mell brushes her coat off with her hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — Mell intends to clear out her hotel room before leaving the planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — Mell provided Nova-Bots to the Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Mell is a wizard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Mell uses Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Mell is a person the narrator considers bringing to the Titan Forge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Mell can keep Horizon company.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Mell is a person who previously fought Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Mell cowered behind two larger Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — Mell is a crew member of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Mell held the Zenith Cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Mell is someone Varic intends to check on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Mell cannot recognize magical signs and portents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 32''' — Mell has a medical room with a console next to her bed to control the medical Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Mell is a crew member of The Last Horizon who wears glasses that scroll with text.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Mell called her Nova-Bot pilots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Mell is a character who was knocked unconscious during an impact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Mell shouted at Raion to explain how his fighting works after the fight.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — Mell pilots a bot and has a real body located on the bridge of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Mell tackled Doctor Oladyne into a wall as a decoy-bot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Mell is on the ship and uses a decoy-bot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Mell is breaking into a console stolen from Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Mell is a character who works with consoles and gemstones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Mell is a crew member who insists on security measures for the vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Mell flagged a location as suspicious in the Vice Chief's console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Mell asks if the heart of the Grand Hive was scooped out and made to disappear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Mell states that core components of an Iron Hive are a big pile of raw materials.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Mell cannot do anything without Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Mell uses androids to assist in repairs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Mell coordinates Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Mell noted that a dive lasted forty-eight minutes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Mell is working with thick glasses and assembling a Nova-Bot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Mell uses decoy-bots that are difficult to distinguish from reality by sight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Mell installs data cores into Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Mell was chewing on three sugar-sticks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Mell focuses on her own research and personal projects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Mell's mind is merely human.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Mell used hand-size Nova-Bots to take samples of Omega's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Mell wears a long white coat with the seven-pointed star of The Last Horizon on its breast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Mell is a character who cackled and slapped Sola on the shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Mell instructed Horizon to fabricate a nondescript shuttle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Mell coordinates groups of Nova-Bots aboard The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Mell can take control of Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Mell attempted to activate the Temporal Field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Mell was restrained in a cot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Mell was strapped to a table beneath a helmet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Mell was comatose in her own quarters.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
